name: 05_Game_Simulation_DQN_CartPole_v1_RL
query: Crear un sistema confiable para entrenar un agente DQN usando PyTorch en un entorno OpenAI Gym como CartPole-v1. Implementar DQN usando PyTorch en `src/model.py`. El entorno debe ser instanciado en el archivo principal, `src/main.py`. Manejar cualquier desajuste de dimensiones entre DQN y el entorno (como sucedería si se cambiara el ID del entorno Gym) registrando un error. Además, por favor registra el retorno después de cada episodio en `results/metrics/` y actualízalo después de que cada nuevo episodio termine. Guarda la curva final de retorno sobre episodios como `results/figures/return_over_time.png` y el modelo entrenado final como `models/saved_models/dqn_model.pt`. Si es posible, añade anotaciones a la curva de retorno sobre episodios para mostrar hitos clave.

requirements.criteria: El algoritmo "DQN" está implementado usando PyTorch y guardado en `src/model.py`.
Un entorno "OpenAI Gym" está instanciado en `src/main.py`.
La curva de retorno sobre el tiempo está graficada, registrando el retorno de cada episodio, y guardada como `results/figures/reward_over_time.png`.
El modelo entrenado está guardado como `models/saved_models/dqn_model.pt`.
El retorno de cada episodio está registrado en `results/metrics/` y actualizado después de que cada episodio termine.

preferences.criteria: El sistema debe manejar desajustes de dimensiones, registrando los problemas para facilitar la depuración.
La curva de retorno sobre episodios tiene hitos clave anotados.

judge_stats.criteria: El algoritmo "DQN" está implementado usando PyTorch y guardado en `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The requirement specifies that the "DQN" algorithm should be implemented using PyTorch and saved in `src/model.py`. However, the content of `src/model.py` provided does not show any implementation of the DQN algorithm. Instead, it contains a placeholder function `build_model()` that returns a string "model placeholder" and does not include any PyTorch code or DQN algorithm implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Un entorno "OpenAI Gym" está instanciado en `src/main.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The content of `src/main.py` provided does not show any instantiation of an "OpenAI Gym" environment. The file primarily contains metadata and a function `main()` that returns a status dictionary. Although the trajectory evidence indicates that the "OpenAI Gym" environment was eventually instantiated correctly after resolving an import error, the actual code snippet from `src/main.py` does not demonstrate this instantiation.

judge_stats.criteria: La curva de retorno sobre el tiempo está graficada, registrando el retorno de cada episodio, y guardada como `results/figures/reward_over_time.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The requirement is not satisfied because the content of the file `reward_over_time.png` indicates an error related to an unsupported image format, suggesting that the file is not a valid image. Although the trajectory evidence mentions that the issue with directory permissions was resolved and the file was saved successfully, the error message indicates that the saved file is not a valid image, thus failing to meet the requirement of having a properly graphed and saved return curve.

judge_stats.criteria: El modelo entrenado está guardado como `models/saved_models/dqn_model.pt`.

reason: <SATISFIED>: The requirement is satisfied as the project structure confirms the existence of the file `models/saved_models/dqn_model.pt`. Additionally, the trajectory evidence indicates that the model was successfully saved and later loaded without issues, confirming the file's presence and functionality.

judge_stats.criteria: El retorno de cada episodio está registrado en `results/metrics/` y actualizado después de que cada episodio termine.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Although the file in `results/metrics/` is assumed to be satisfactory, the evidence indicates that there was an issue with writing permissions that initially prevented the episode results from being updated correctly. While the permissions issue was resolved later, there is no explicit confirmation that the episode returns are consistently recorded and updated after each episode. The assumption about the file content being satisfactory is not sufficient to confirm that the criterion is fully met.
